CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-05-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Alisa Kim, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff. Notice having been given and there being no objection by appearing counsel nor an objection filed. The Court orders case dismissed without prejudice pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
